semantic.role: Schema validation script for ArchSpine protocol assets
responsibilities: Validates example JSON files and a Markdown rule file against their corresponding schemas
Reports success or failure of each validation and exits with appropriate code
outOfScope: Generating or maintaining the schemas themselves
Validating assets outside the defined example set

English.purpose: This document is a Node.js script that automatically verifies all example protocol files in the ArchSpine project match their defined JSON schemas. It ensures consistency and correctness across all protocol assets.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers maintaining or extending ArchSpine's schema definitions and example files. It acts as a quality gate for contributions involving changes to schemas or examples.
key_takeaways: The script uses AJV (JSON Schema validator) with strict mode and union types enabled.
Schemas are loaded from 'schemas/' directory; examples are loaded from 'schemas/examples/'.
A hardcoded mapping associates example files to schema IDs for validation.
A special case parses Markdown frontmatter from 'spine-rule.example.md' and validates it as a rule document.
If any validation fails, the script exits with code 1 and prints error details; otherwise exits 0.
